content:
Well-thought-through product announcements will help increase feature awareness and engage users with new functionality. Just like sharing your public roadmap, it’s also a great way to let potential customers see that you’re constantly improving.
Further reading Read How to announce product updates and features
summary: Well-thought-through product announcements will help increase feature awareness and engage users with new functionality. Just like sharing your public roadmap, it’s also a great way to let potential customers see that you’re constantly improving.
title: Coming Soon...

content:
Guides lead a user through a specific task they want to accomplish, often with a sequence of steps. Writing a good guide requires thinking about what your users are trying to do.
Further reading Read about how-to guides in the Diátaxis framework
summary: Guides lead a user through a specific task they want to accomplish, often with a sequence of steps. Writing a good guide requires thinking about what your users are trying to do.
